top_signals.title: JetBlue CEO Speaks on Potential Consolidation at IATA
top_signals.summary: JetBlue CEO Joanna Geraghty speaks at the International Air Transport Association (IATA) on potential consolidation saying "never say never". (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
